answer: Our QA Automation courses are competitively priced to ensure accessibility. For the latest pricing on the Playwright, Selenium, or Full Stack QA courses, please visit our [Courses Page](/courses) or contact us directly for current seasonal discounts!

Our curriculum is industry-focused! 
- **Playwright**: Setup, Locators, Assertions, Page Object Model, CI/CD with GitHub Actions.
- **Selenium**: Java/Python bindings, WebDriver architecture, TestNG/PyTest, Framework design.
- **API Testing**: Postman, RestAssured, and Automated API validation.
You can download the full syllabus on each individual [course page](/courses).

We provide 100% placement assistance, including resume building, mock interviews, and direct referrals to our partner companies. While no institute can 'guarantee' a job, we ensure you are technically ready to crack the best product-based companies.
Yes! Upon successful completion of the course and the final project, you will receive an industry-recognized certificate from Nishad IT Solutions which you can showcase on LinkedIn and your resume.
Absolutely! We offer a free demo session every weekend. You can book your slot by clicking the 'Book Free Demo' button on our homepage or by [contacting us](/contact).
